{{Infobox group
| name = Witnesses (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[Witnesses (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Witnesses are members of a [[Guild]] tasked with providing impartial and precise accounts of significant historical occurrences within the [[Empire]]. Their reports carry immense political weight, as they have the power to influence the opinions of the entire [[Empire]] and can determine whether individuals remain in positions of authority. To ensure accuracy and safety, Witnesses typically operate in pairs consisting of a [[Chronicler]], who is responsible for recording information, and a [[Silent One]], who serves as the protector for the [[Chronicler]]. While the [[Guild]] generally discourages romantic involvement between members, they often prefer working in sibling pairs due to the constant travel required by their duties. Members of this group are identified by specific attire, including cloths covering their mouths and candles attached to their belts, as well as loose clothing designed to allow for combat if required. The leadership of the [[Guild]] is notable for its ability to perform both the protective and recording roles interchangeably.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Witnesses serve as an organization for which [[Naberius Clayborn]] works. Within this group, members are discouraged from forming personal relationships by the [[Guild]]. During an interrogation, [[Zhen]] instructed a prisoner to reserve his biography for the Witnesses. On one occasion, two members of the group were present together, though [[Shera]] has a history of killing those belonging to the organization.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Witnesses is a group that [[Naberius Clayborn]] works for.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Zhen]] told the prisoner to save his biography for the Witnesses.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has killed Witnesses before.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Guild]] discourages relationships between Witnesses.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|There were two Witnesses present.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Witnesses investigate claims of wrongdoing.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Witnesses can [[Read]] clothing and weaponry to provide notarized testimony.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Witnesses can verify testimony and support alliances.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Witnesses are a guild dedicated to speaking the unvarnished truth and serving as neutral arbitrators. Operating in pairs composed of a [[Chronicler]] and a [[Silent One]], these individuals possess the ability to collaborate on the construction of boxes used to seal [[Vessels]]. During the events in the tower, both sets of Witnesses remained alive and provided reports regarding the deaths of various [[Guild Heads]]. As a source of hope following recent events, the twin Witnesses were specifically identified by [[Bareius]] as one of the [[Guild Heads]] who should be spared from assassination.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Witnesses act as neutral arbitrators.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Witnesses can collaborate on creating boxes to seal [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Witnesses work in pairs consisting of a [[Chronicler]] and a [[Silent One]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Both sets of Witnesses were still alive in the tower.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Witnesses report on the deaths of [[Guild Heads]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Witnesses are the hope from the events of today.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Witnesses are a guild that speaks the unvarnished truth.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The twin Witnesses are one of the [[Guild Heads]] [[Bareius]] suggests should not be assassinated.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“A Chronicler, working for the Witnesses,” Kerian answered.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Save your biography for the Witnesses.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
